name: MFA Request Generation - Push Notification Bombing (MFA Fatigue)
description: Detects MFA push notification bombing by identifying rapid successive MFA push denials (5+ in 10 minutes) followed by approval. Covers Azure AD, Okta, and Duo MFA fatigue attacks.
note: For Okta: event.dataset: 'okta.system' and event.action: 'user.mfa.factor.verify' and event.outcome: 'FAILURE'. For Duo: source.dataset: 'duo' and result: 'DENY'
